name: Red Peak Golf
about: Red Peak Golf is an indoor golf simulator facility located within the larger Red Peak Gym complex in Cedar City, UT. It operates on a 24/7 access model and is designed as a year-round golfing destination, accommodating all skill levels from beginners to serious golfers chasing a lower handicap. The facility utilizes cutting-edge Trackman technology and is situated within a 20,000 sq ft state-of-the-art building at 1865 W 400 N. As part of a multi-sport center, it shares a focus on safety, expert coaching, and creating a supportive environment for athletes, offering both professional guidance and the freedom for unstructured practice.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to bays, offering maximum flexibility and convenience for practice at any time
Equipped with advanced Trackman technology providing highly accurate data and simulation
Professional coaching is available for players looking to improve their game

food_and_drink.notes: No specific on-site dining services are mentioned, but the venue is part of a larger gym complex.
No alcohol services are mentioned on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge technology providing accurate ball flight data and simulation

faq.answer: The website does not mention any restrictions on bringing food and drink, nor does it specify any food or beverage services are available on-site.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue is part of a larger multi-sport facility (Red Peak Gym) that focuses on developing athletes of all ages, making it a family-friendly environment.
